dataSources.title: Data consulted

coachsPage.title: Your AI Coaches
coachsPage.subtitle: Alex and Julie know your profile, goals, and preferences. Ask them anything, they're here for you.
coachsPage.alexDesc: Alex is your personal sport coach available 24/7. He knows your level, equipment, and goals. He adapts your sessions in real time and answers all your training questions.
coachsPage.adaptsSessionsDesc: Based on your form, available time, and daily constraints
coachsPage.alternativesDesc: In case of pain, fatigue, or lack of equipment
coachsPage.julieDesc: Julie is your personal nutritionist. She knows your caloric goals, dietary restrictions, and preferences. She helps you create adapted meals and generates your shopping list.
coachsPage.generatesRecipesDesc: Personalized to your tastes and macros
coachsPage.shoppingListDesc: Optimized for the week with estimated budget
coachsPage.ctaDesc: Alex and Julie are waiting to accompany you in your transformation. Start your free trial and ask them your first question.

alexConversations.user: My right knee hurts, can I still do my leg session?
alexConversations.assistant: I understand your situation. For today's leg session, I suggest alternatives without knee impact: replace squats with leg press with reduced range, avoid lunges and focus on hamstring extensions on machine. Same volume, but protecting your joint. Want me to generate an adapted session?

alexConversations.user: I only have 30 minutes today instead of 1 hour
alexConversations.assistant: No problem! I'll condense your session. We'll keep the 3 main exercises (bench press, rowing, squat) with 3 sets instead of 4, and reduce rest times to 90 seconds. You'll have an effective workout in 28 minutes. Ready?

alexConversations.user: I've been stuck on bench press for 2 weeks
alexConversations.assistant: Classic plateau! Here are 3 solutions: 1) Add a 2-second pause at the bottom next week, 2) Try incline bench as your main exercise for 2 weeks, 3) Increase volume: go from 3x8 to 4x6 with the same weight. Which option appeals to you?

julieConversations.user: I'm vegetarian, can you adapt my nutrition plan?
julieConversations.assistant: Of course! Your protein intake (140g/day) will be provided by: tofu, tempeh, legumes, eggs and plant-based protein powder. I'll replace chicken with marinated tofu, beef with lentils, and add grain + legume combinations for complete proteins. Want me to generate a typical day?

julieConversations.user: I don't like broccoli, what can I replace it with?
julieConversations.assistant: No problem! Here are equivalent alternatives in fiber and micronutrients: green beans, spinach, zucchini, or cauliflower. For your 200g of vegetables per meal, you can alternate these options. Shall I update your plan with your preferences?

julieConversations.user: Generate my shopping list for the week
julieConversations.assistant:
Here's your 7-day shopping list:

🥩 Proteins: 1kg chicken, 500g salmon, 12 eggs, 500g lean ground beef
🥬 Vegetables: 1kg broccoli, 500g spinach, 6 zucchini, 2kg tomatoes
🍚 Starchy foods: 1kg basmati rice, 500g oats, 1kg sweet potatoes
🥛 Dairy: 1L milk, 6 plain Greek yogurts
🥜 Other: olive oil, almonds, bananas

Estimated total: €45-55. Want me to email this list?
